reviews.comment:
Excelente el servicio de las oficinas para socios. Sin embargo, las islas de combustible sobre Avda Colón  tienen demora para la  carga y a veces me he retirado sin poder cargar.  La atención por Brown y Santa Fe es mucho mejor y Los playeros siempre dispuestos a ayudar

(Translated by Google)
The service at the member offices is excellent. However, the fuel stations on Avenida Colón have long waiting times, and sometimes I've left without being able to fill up. The service at the Brown and Santa Fe stations is much better, and the attendants are always willing to help.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbHJuOHB3RRAB
